<!-- Thanks for contributing to Enveloo! Keep PRs focused and small where you can. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue it closes, e.g. "Closes #12". -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (in `apps/worker`)
- [ ] `npm test` passes, and new behavior has a test
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.dev.vars`, keys, tokens)
- [ ] Input is validated and errors do not leak internals
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs context: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI changes. -->
